/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgstnvdsretinaface.so -o ../../gst-plugins/libgstnvdsretinaface.so CMakeFiles/gstnvdsretinaface.dir/gstnvdsretinaface.cpp.o   -L/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib libretinaface_engine.a ../../libretinaface_postproc.a ../../libmergenvision_kernels.a -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so -lnvds_meta -lnvdsgst_meta -lnvds_utils -lnvinfer -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
